recommendations.title: The Knight Before Christmas
recommendations.overview: A medieval English knight is magically transported to present day where he ends up falling for a high school science teacher.

recommendations.title: The Muppet Christmas Carol
recommendations.overview: A retelling of the classic Dickens tale of Ebenezer Scrooge, miser extraordinaire. He is held accountable for his dastardly ways during night-time visitations by the Ghosts of Christmas Past, Present and Future.

recommendations.title: Stand by Me Doraemon
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Science Fiction, Drama, Family, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: Sewashi and Doraemon find themselves way back in time and meet Nobita. It is up to Doraemon to take care of Nobita or else he will not return to the present.

recommendations.title: The Jacket
recommendations.genres: Drama, Mystery, Science Fiction, Thriller, Fantasy
recommendations.overview: A military veteran goes on a journey into the future, where he can foresee his death and is left with questions that could save his life and those he loves.

recommendations.title: Boy & the World
recommendations.overview: Suffering because of his father's departure to the big city, a boy leaves his village and discovers a fantastic world dominated by bug-engines and strange beings. An unusual animation with various artistic techniques that portrays the issues of the m

recommendations.title: Invisible Sister
recommendations.overview: Teenager Cleo's school science project goes quite awry, causing her popular older sister Molly to go invisible.

recommendations.title: Journey to the Center of the Earth
recommendations.genres: Action, Science Fiction, Adventure, Comedy, Family
recommendations.overview: On a quest to find out what happened to his missing brother, a scientist, his nephew and their mountain guide discover a fantastic and dangerous lost world in the center of the earth.

recommendations.title: The Chronicles of Narnia: The Voyage of the Dawn Treader
recommendations.overview: This time around Edmund and Lucy Pevensie, along with their pesky cousin Eustace Scrubb find themselves swallowed into a painting and on to a fantastic Narnian ship headed for the very edges of the world.

recommendations.title: Arco
recommendations.genres: Animation, Adventure, Fantasy, Family, Science Fiction
recommendations.overview: 10-year-old Arco lives in a far future. During his first flight in his rainbow suit, he loses control and falls into the past. Iris, a girl his age from 2075, comes to his rescue and tries by all means to help send him back to his era.

recommendations.title: A Knight in Camelot
recommendations.overview: Yet another variation on Mark Twain's "A Connecticut Yankee At King Arthur's Court." Here, a computer malfunction causes a science researcher to be sent back in time with her laptop, which she uses to amaze the court.
